command:
pwd && ls -la && [ -f SOUL.md ] && sed -n '1,220p' SOUL.md; [ -f USER.md ] && sed -n '1,220p' USER.md; d=$(date -u +%F); y=$(date -u -d 'yesterday' +%F 2>/dev/null || python - <<'PY'
from datetime import datetime, timedelta, timezone
print((datetime.now(timezone.utc)-timedelta(days=1)).strftime('%F'))
PY
); [ -f memory/$d.md ] && { echo '---TODAY---'; sed -n '1,220p' memory/$d.md; }; [ -f memory/$y.md ] && { echo '---YESTERDAY---'; sed -n '1,220p' memory/$y.md; }; [ -f MEMORY.md ] && sed -n '1,260p' MEMORY.md; echo '---TRIAGE---'; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/notes/billing-sync-triage.md
